news.title: India’s GDP, inflation at risk amid West Asia tensions, oil price surge: Economists
news.india_relevance: Directly addresses the macroeconomic stability of India regarding growth and price stability during global conflict.
news.why_it_matters: Quantifies the risk to India's fiscal math and inflation targets as crude prices threaten to breach budget assumptions.

news.title: India to ease curbs, fast-track Chinese investment in more sectors
news.india_relevance: Represents a significant pivot in India's foreign direct investment policy specifically targeting its largest trading neighbor.
news.why_it_matters: Signals a pragmatic shift to boost local manufacturing by allowing essential Chinese capital and expertise back into the ecosystem.

news.title: Middle East Crisis: How rising oil prices are squeezing Indian fuel retailers’ margins? EXPLAINED
news.india_relevance: Explains the financial mechanics of India's state-owned oil marketing companies (OMCs).
news.why_it_matters: Breaks down the disconnect between global crude spikes and frozen domestic pump prices that impacts OMC balance sheets.

news.title: Factories to the fore: India must reboot its growth model before the AI-pocalypse hits its IT sector
news.india_relevance: Analyzes the structural necessity of shifting India's economic engine from services to manufacturing.
news.why_it_matters: Argues that India's traditional IT-led growth is vulnerable to AI, necessitating a rapid transition to labor-intensive factory jobs.

news.title: State Bank of India and MUFG sign partnership to strengthen India-Japan economic corridor
news.india_relevance: A major structural partnership between India's largest bank and Japan's largest lender.
news.why_it_matters: Facilitates smoother capital flows for M&A and infrastructure projects within the critical India-Japan trade axis.

news.title: Cabinet clears IBC tweaks, quicker resolution likely - The Financial Express
news.india_relevance: A major policy update to India's primary bankruptcy and insolvency framework.
news.why_it_matters: Aims to reduce delays in the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code, which is vital for cleaning up bank balance sheets and recycling capital.

news.title: Chinese FDI may aid India’s shift from electronics assembly to component manufacturing: CRISIL
news.india_relevance: Connects foreign investment policy to the structural evolution of India's electronics sector.
news.why_it_matters: Explains how moving from 'assembling' to 'making components' is the next necessary step for India's manufacturing maturity.

news.title: Niti Aayog urges states to stick to FRBM norms, strengthen fiscal discipline
news.india_relevance: Focuses on the fiscal health of Indian states, which is crucial for national credit ratings.
